name: landing-forge-mcp
description: MCP server that generates complete, production-ready HTML landing pages, product cards, and pricing tables

tools.name: generate_landing_page
tools.description: Generate a complete, production-ready HTML landing page with responsive design, hero section, features grid, CTA, and footer. Returns a self-contained HTML document with inline CSS and no external dependencies.

tools.name: generate_product_card
tools.description: Generate a standalone HTML product card component with inline CSS. Perfect for embedding in landing pages, stores, or product showcases.

tools.name: generate_pricing_table
tools.description: Generate a complete pricing table HTML component with multiple plan columns. Supports highlighting a recommended plan. Uses dark theme with inline CSS.
